description: catwalk comes up with yet another stylish pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted for high fashion and superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with skinny jeans or ethnic suits. Heel: 2.5" Upper Toe holder and midfoot strap with heavy embellishments Fabric velveteen footbed Embossed branding on the heel Outsole TPU outsole with grooves on the wedge heel Herringbone grooves on the forefoot and terraced grooves on the heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
